001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.session;
002
003import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
004
005import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;
006
007public class CustomNumberHolder {
008
009    private final AtomicInteger atomicInteger = new AtomicInteger(1);
010    private Unit currentUnit = Unit.UNIT_1;
011
012    public int getAmount() {
013        return atomicInteger.get();
014    }
015
016    public void setAmount(int amount) {
017        atomicInteger.set(amount);
018    }
019
020    public void increaseAmount() {
021        int current = atomicInteger.addAndGet(currentUnit.getAmount());
022
023        if (current < 1) {
024            atomicInteger.set(1);
025        }
026    }
027
028    public void decreaseAmount() {
029        int current = atomicInteger.addAndGet(-currentUnit.getAmount());
030
031        if (current < 1) {
032            atomicInteger.set(1);
033        }
034    }
035
036    public @NotNull Unit getUnit() {
037        return currentUnit;
038    }
039
040    public void changeAmountUnit() {
041        currentUnit = currentUnit.next();
042    }
043
044    public enum Unit {
045        UNIT_1(1),
046        UNIT_10(10),
047        UNIT_32(32),
048        UNIT_64(64),
049        UNIT_128(128),
050        UNIT_256(256);
051
052        private final int amount;
053
054        Unit(int amount) {
055            this.amount = amount;
056        }
057
058        public int getAmount() {
059            return amount;
060        }
061
062        public @NotNull Unit next() {
063            var values = values();
064            var index = ordinal() + 1;
065
066            if (index == values.length) {
067                index = 0;
068            }
069
070            return values[index];
071        }
072    }
073}
